summary: Patched the marketing runners so distribution_architecture_guard_pause / guard_follow_through reuse expires once the short review-window release time has passed, then refreshed the live board onto current truth.

why_this_action.problem: The latest board/lane surfaces were still stuck on a May 25 guard-pause artifact even though that pause window ended at 2026-05-28T03:03:00+02:00.
why_this_action.why_now: The active marketer slot landed after the listed blocker cleared. Reusing the expired guard artifact would have hidden the real May 28 truth and risked more fake-progress hold churn.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat and is still the primary success gate
apollo_sequence_status_latest.json: Apollo is already live and in a measurement window
outreach-log.md: avoid repeating already-delivered packet families

changes.behavior: Guard-pause and guard-follow-through reuse now goes stale at or after the configured short_review_window_release_at instead of surviving indefinitely inside later runs.

live_result.summary: Execution board refreshed, but no truthful do-now lane was available; the board itself is the structural truth source.

expected_outcome: Post-release marketer runs stop inheriting expired guard-pause truth and instead surface the current board/hold state, improving the odds that the next truthful lane at or after 2026-05-28T09:12:15+02:00 is acted on promptly.
